pois.name: Osteria Toscana
pois.description: Typical Tuscan cuisine with antipasti, homemade pasta, and meat second courses. Authentic local flavors in a traditional osteria setting.
pois.address: Via Rosignanina, 91, 56040 Santa Luce PI

pois.name: Hosteria L'Agrifoglio
pois.description: Excellent pizza, Mediterranean and Italian cuisine in Castellina Marittima. Highly rated for quality food and friendly service. Great value for money.
pois.address: Via del Commercio, 76, 56040 Castellina Marittima PI

pois.name: Osteria del Cavaiolo
pois.description: Gastropub with Mediterranean and Italian food in the heart of Castellina Marittima. Local favorite with authentic atmosphere in the main piazza.
pois.address: Piazza Giuseppe Garibaldi, 4, 56040 Castellina Marittima PI

pois.name: Trattoria dei Vecchi Sapori
pois.description: Traditional trattoria serving Italian, Tuscan, and Central-Italian cuisine. Known for soups and Mediterranean options. Authentic old-world flavors.
pois.address: Piazza Tripoli, 56042 Lorenzana PI

pois.name: La Lucciola
pois.description: Chic seafront dining with terrace offering simple fish lunches and sophisticated evening menus. Should be a Michelin star restaurant according to reviewers. Food is a real palate journey.
pois.address: Lungomare Colombo, 57016 Castiglioncello LI

pois.name: Il Sorpasso
pois.description: Featured in Gambero Rosso guide. Aesthetic and ethical cuisine championing seasonality and freshness. Three six-course tasting menus available: Trasparenze, Impronte, and Sfumature. Emotional dining experience.
pois.address: Via Aurelia, 57016 Castiglioncello LI

pois.name: Ristorante Il Coccodrillo
pois.description: Charming waterfront restaurant and pizzeria with stunning views. Wraparound windows create bright, breezy atmosphere. Excellent fish dishes and seafood alongside pizza and pasta.
pois.address: Lungomare Colombo, 57016 Castiglioncello LI

pois.name: Colline Pisane Hiking Trails
pois.description: Network of trails through the green heart of Pisa province. Old unpaved roads connect medieval villages through wheat fields, olive groves, and vineyards. Can be done on foot, by bike, or horseback. Stunning Tuscan landscapes.
pois.address: Various trailheads throughout Colline Pisane

pois.name: Anello delle Colline Lorenzana-Orciano
pois.description: Challenging 20km ring trail from Lorenzana through beautiful hills to Orciano Pisano. About 5 hours walking. Stunning ridge-top views. Can also be done one-way. Robust footwear recommended.
pois.address: Start: Lorenzana village center, 56042 PI

pois.name: Marina di Cecina Main Beach
pois.description: Popular town beach from Cecina river to southern Marina. Almost entirely beach establishments with some free sections. Sandy with clear water, divided by breakwaters. Blue Flag every year.
pois.address: Lungomare, 57023 Marina di Cecina LI

pois.name: Museo Giorgio Kienerk
pois.description: Museum in former 19th-century magistrate's court, housed in old prison cells. Preserves works of post-Macchiaioli painter Kienerk - oils, bas-reliefs, sculptures, engravings. Unique setting.
pois.address: Piazza della Repubblica, 56043 Fauglia PI

pois.name: Volterra Alabaster Ecomuseum
pois.description: Discover thousand-year tradition of alabaster craftsmanship still alive in Volterra workshops. Extraordinary creations on display. Watch artisans work in downtown botteghe.
pois.address: Piazza dei Priori, 56048 Volterra PI

pois.name: Il Canneto di Pomaia
pois.description: Farm stay 10 minutes from Santa Luce Lake. Opportunities for hiking, horseback riding, and tennis in the area. Peaceful countryside setting.
pois.address: Località Il Canneto, 56040 Pomaia, Santa Luce PI

pois.name: Cantina delle Colline Pisane
pois.description: Cooperative winery in Crespina producing excellent Chianti and variety of other wines. Popular for tastings - visitors keep returning for the chianti. Good value.
pois.address: Via Brodolini, 56042 Crespina PI

pois.name: Fattoria Fibbiano
pois.description: Private vineyard tours with wine tasting in beautiful estate. Personal experience often led by winemakers themselves. Part of Strada del Vino delle Colline Pisane.
pois.address: Via di Fibbiano, 56030 Terricciola PI

pois.name: Frantoio del Monte Pisano
pois.description: Quality extra virgin olive oil producer offering guided tours, tastings, and training. Modern equipment with traditional methods. In heart of Monte Pisano olive territory.
pois.address: Via del Frantoio, 56010 Buti PI
pois.hours: Tours by appointment, shop hours vary

pois.name: Frantoio di Vicopisano
pois.description: Private frantoio with state-of-the-art equipment. Owns 3,000 olive trees, hand-picks at optimum ripeness. Organic IGP Toscano olive oil. Part of Monte Pisano Olive Oil Route.
pois.address: Via del Frantoio, 56010 Vicopisano PI
pois.hours: Check website for harvest season visits

pois.name: Bici Paolo
pois.description: Bicycle sales, repairs, and rentals in Rosignano Marittimo. Local bike shop for all cycling needs.
pois.address: Via Aurelia, 57016 Rosignano Solvay LI

pois.name: Grotte Gialle
pois.description: Mystical V-shaped passages through tuff-like rock on million-year-old seabed. Hidden near Riparbella. Contains Etruscan tombs from 4th century BC and impressive murals. Atmospheric exploration.
pois.address: Near Riparbella PI (ask locally for directions)

pois.name: Scornabecchi Garden
pois.description: Beautiful woodland area near Riparbella with typical Mediterranean scrubland flora. Well-marked paths through nature. Medieval springs nearby. Peaceful escape.
pois.address: Near Riparbella PI

pois.name: Flora Bio - Organic Products
pois.description: Organic cosmetics and lavender products company. Headquarters in Lorenzana - lavender essential oil, cosmetics available even when festival is suspended. High-quality natural products.
pois.address: Via Amendola, 56042 Lorenzana PI

pois.name: Bagno Armida
pois.description: Family beach establishment in Marina di Cecina. Play areas for children, beach volleyball, accessibility paths for wheelchairs. Full services in friendly atmosphere.
pois.address: Lungomare, 57023 Marina di Cecina LI

pois.name: Wimbi Beach Bar
pois.description: Beach establishment that transforms into beach bar at sunset. Dancing, live music, and DJ sets in summer. Young, vibrant atmosphere on Marina di Cecina coast.
pois.address: Lungomare, 57023 Marina di Cecina LI
pois.hours: Daytime beach, evening entertainment in summer
